reasoning: To reach $170,000 by Dec 31, 2025, BTC would need to surge ~35% from its October 2025 high of $126,198 in just 52 days. While Bitcoin has a history of explosive late-cycle ‘blow-off tops,’ implied volatility has compressed to around 40% in 2025. Using geometric Brownian motion approximations for barrier options, the risk-neutral probability of touching $170,000 in ~0.14 years with 40% vol is about 5%. Factoring in potential fat-tail dynamics and a typical post-halving peak window extending to early 2026, the real probability is slightly elevated but remains low given the massive market cap growth (approaching ~$3.3T) required within a very constrained timeframe.
